title: "Dependent On" Field is non-responsive
excerpt: What would cause the ‘dependent on’ field to be non selectable?  It was working previously and I tried to add a dependency and not it is non-responsive.

posts.author: GerardoA (Gerardo Avalos)
posts.cookedHtml: What would cause the ‘dependent on’ field to be non selectable? It was working previously and I tried to add a dependency and not it is non-responsive.

posts.author: StephanieRP (Stephanie Troemel)
posts.cookedHtml: This is happening on my account as well starting today. I have an open ticket with support to address the issue. I’ll update if I have a solution.

posts.author: StephanieRP (Stephanie Troemel)
posts.cookedHtml: They have released a patch. Refresh your page and it should work!

posts.author: GerardoA (Gerardo Avalos)
posts.cookedHtml: Excellent! Thanks. It’s working for me now!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
